name: style-achiever-and-maintainer
description: given a codebase and style targets, make changes to ensure the codebase is clean, consistent, and adheres to the defined style guidelines. This includes identifying and fixing style issues, refactoring code for better readability, and maintaining a high standard of code quality throughout the project. that visually aligns with the defined style guidelines, ensuring a cohesive and polished user interface.

<!-- Tip: Use /create-skill in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

this skill is responsible for ensuring that the codebase adheres to defined style guidelines and maintains a high standard of code quality. The agent will identify and fix style issues, refactor code for better readability, and ensure that the user interface visually aligns with the defined style guidelines. This skill is crucial for maintaining a cohesive and polished user interface throughout the project.
ocassional reference images or code examples from the inspirational project will be grabbed to guide the agent in making style decisions that align with the desired aesthetic and functional goals of the project. The agent will also stay updated on any changes to the style guidelines and ensure that all code changes are consistent with these guidelines.
